skillSlots.name: Battle God Barrage
skillSlots.description: Attack the enemy column with the most units 3 times, dealing 70% ATK Physical DMG per hit; gain 20% Lifesteal Rate when casting this skill

skillSlots.name: Divine Aura Purge
skillSlots.description: Attack the enemy with the highest ATK 4 times, dealing Physical DMG equal to 70% ATK per hit; then attack all enemies 2 times, dealing Physical DMG equal to 70% ATK per hit.

effects.name: Conquest Anthem
effects.description: Mars' attacks deal extra Physical DMG equal to 6% of target's max HP (each damage instance is calculated independently, capped at 100% of caster's ATK); Gain 1 [Blazing Flame] Stack per attack or when hit

effects.name: Conquest Anthem
effects.description: Feat Skill: 40% chance to apply [Cripple] to target

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: Ultimate Skill has 100% chance to apply <color=#FFEB04>[Fear]</color> to the enemy with highest ATK; <color=#FFEB04>[Fear]</color>: Cannot act when HP is below 60%; Undispellable; lasts 2 turns

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: When [Blazing Flame] Stacks reach 10: Gain 30% Critical Rate & Defense Penetration

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: Ultimate deal extra True DMG to main target, equal to [Blazing Flame] Stacks * 1% of target's current HP (per stack capped at 20% of caster's ATK); then pply [Cripple]

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: Whenever taking damage equal to 30% of max HP, cast Special Skill once while ignoring control effects (max 4 triggers per turn)

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: Reset cooldown when defeating an enemy with Ultimate or Special Skill; 50% chance to apply [Fear] to other enemy targets
